title: MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `key_dup()`
description:
MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `key_dup()`.

It can be reproduced on the docker image `monetdb/monetdb:Mar2025-SP1` and `monetdb/dev-builds:default`.
poc: CREATE TABLE table1 (column1 INT, column2 INT, CONSTRAINT constraint1 UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT (column1, column2));
ALTER TABLE table1 DROP COLUMN column2 CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE table1 DROP CONSTRAINT constraint1 CASCADE;
key_bug_features: Crash during key duplication in MonetDB
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT, UNIQUE (name, age));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 25);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD CONSTRAINT unique_name_age UNIQUE (name, age);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (3, 'Alice', 30);
